hooks.command:
command=$(jq -r '.tool_input.command // empty'); if [[ "$command" == git*commit* ]]; then if ! echo "$command" | grep -qE 'git commit.*-m.*"?(feat|fix|refactor|test|docs|chore|style|perf)(\([^)]+\))?:'; then echo '{"continue": false, "stopReason": "Commit message must follow Conventional Commits format: <type>(<scope>): <subject>

Valid types: feat, fix, refactor, test, docs, chore, style, perf

Example: feat(entry-view): implement double-tap to restore last weight"}'; exit 0; fi; fi; echo '{"continue": true}'
